name: Sharon's Bread Pudding with Custard Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 French Bread Loaf, Torn into 1-inch Pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Whip the eggs until foamy.
2. Add sugar, spices, vanilla, and melted butter; mix well.
3. Add milk and torn pieces of French bread. Mix until all bread is saturated.
4. Add pecans and raisins, if using. Pour into a greased 9 x 13 inch pan.
5. Bake at 350 degrees for 45 minutes.
6. While the bread is in the oven, make the custard sauce.
7. Beat eggs and egg yolks together until light and creamy.
8. Beat in sugar, cornstarch, milk, and evaporated milk.
9. Microwave on high for 2 minutes.
10. Whip with a wire whisk.
11. Continue cooking on high until the mixture is very thick, stirring with a wire whisk every 30 to 60 seconds.
12. If overcooked, blend in a food processor or blender until smooth.
13. Remove from microwave and whisk in vanilla and amaretto or rum.
14. Spoon over hot bread mixture in attractive bowls or glasses.
15. Serve warm. If making ahead, refrigerate both the bread and custard. Re-warm both in the microwave.
